name: brain-workspace
title: Agent-Native Brain Workspace
description: Agent-Native Brain Agent-Native template ported into Studio UI as a Harness-safe workspace surface with route inventory, provenance, resident-renderer blocks, and display-only agent/action affordances.

files.content:
{
  "$schema": "https://jami.studio/schemas/registry/workspace-manifest.generated.json",
  "name": "@jami-studio/brain-workspace",
  "workspace": "brain",
  "schemaVersion": "2026-06-29.agent-native-template-workspace",
  "items": [
    "jami-theme",
    "panel",
    "button",
    "docs-source-panel",
    "brain-app",
    "brain-home-page",
    "brain-extensions-detail-detail-page",

    "brain-knowledge-page",
    "brain-ops-page",

    "brain-extensions-detail-block",
    "brain-extensions-index-block",
    "brain-extensions-block",

    "brain-ops-block",
    "brain-review-block",
    "brain-search-block",
    "brain-settings-block",
    "brain-sources-block",
    "brain-team-block"
  ],

    "root": "brain-workspace",
    "dependencies": [
      "jami-theme",
      "panel",
      "button",
      "docs-source-panel",
      "brain-app",
      "brain-home-page",

      "brain-home-block",
      "brain-extensions-detail-detail-block",
      "brain-extensions-detail-block",
      "brain-extensions-index-block",
      "brain-extensions-block",
      "brain-knowledge-block",
      "brain-ops-block",
      "brain-review-block",
      "brain-search-block",
      "brain-settings-block",
      "brain-sources-block",
      "brain-team-block"
    ]
  },
  "plannedSurfaces": [
    "brain",
    "extensions",
    "extensions",
    "extensions",
    "extensions",
    "knowledge",
    "ops",
    "review",
    "search",
    "settings",
    "sources",
    "team"
  ],
  "shell": {
    "sourceSchemaVersion": "2026-06-29.agent-native-template-workspace",
    "title": "Agent-Native Brain",
    "summary": "Agent-Native Brain Agent-Native template ported into Studio UI as a Harness-safe workspace surface with route inventory, provenance, resident-renderer blocks, and display-only agent/action affordances.",
    "appShell": {
      "id": "app.brain.shell",
      "layout": "agent-native-template-workspace",
      "navigation": [
        {
          "label": "Home",
          "route": "/brain"
        },
        {
          "label": "Extensions Detail Detail",
          "route": "/brain/extensions/:id/:slug"
        },
        {
          "label": "Extensions Detail",
          "route": "/brain/extensions/:id"
        },
        {
          "label": "Extensions Index",
          "route": "/brain/extensions"
        },
        {
          "label": "Extensions",
          "route": "/brain/extensions"
        },
        {
          "label": "Knowledge",
          "route": "/brain/knowledge"
        },
        {
          "label": "Ops",
          "route": "/brain/ops"
        },
        {
          "label": "Review",
          "route": "/brain/review"
        }
      ]
    },
    "routes": [
      {
        "path": "/brain",
        "page": "page.brain.home",
        "title": "Brain Home",
        "blocks": [
          "block.brain.home"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/brain/app/routes/_index.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/brain/extensions/:id/:slug",
        "page": "page.brain.extensions-detail-detail",
        "title": "Extensions Detail Detail",
        "blocks": [
          "block.brain.extensions-detail-detail"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/brain/app/routes/extensions.$id.$slug.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/brain/extensions/:id",
        "page": "page.brain.extensions-detail",
        "title": "Extensions Detail",
        "blocks": [
          "block.brain.extensions-detail"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/brain/app/routes/extensions.$id.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/brain/extensions",
        "page": "page.brain.extensions-index",

        "blocks": [
          "block.brain.extensions-index"

lifecycle.migrationNotes: Agent-Native Agent-Native Brain template imported from yrka-io/agent-native as a complete Studio UI workspace shell over all discovered route files; execution remains display-only behind Jami Harness contracts.

upstream.importedAs: jami-authored workspace shell and registry metadata derived from Agent-Native template structure

compatibility.shadcn: Studio UI registry metadata generated from Agent-Native template route inventory; source app remains upstream-owned until forked into Jami packages.
compatibility.tailwind: Consumes generated --jami-* CSS variables in the Studio UI workbench port.
